app.title: Local Game Gallery
app.mirrorFallbackBannerBody: Browsing from metadata mirror fallback. Launch actions are disabled until the primary root is reachable.

upload.title: Upload game archive
upload.archiveHint: Drop a zip file here or click to browse.
upload.importStatusHint: Import in progress. Keep this window open until completion.
upload.statusNameVersionRequired: Game name and game version are required.
upload.statusArchiveRequired: Choose an archive file before importing.

setup.title: Setup
setup.savedBetweenLaunches: Configuration is saved between app launches.
setup.languageHint: Saved with setup and applied automatically on next launch.
setup.vaultPinHint: Set a PIN to require unlock before showing vaulted games.
setup.gamesRootLockedByDocker: Managed by Docker mount. Update LGG_GAMES_ROOT in docker/.env (or shell env) and restart the container to change this path.
setup.dockerManagedRootsWarning: Games root and metadata mirror root are managed by Docker mounts. Update LGG_GAMES_ROOT and LGG_METADATA_MIRROR_ROOT in docker/.env (or shell env) and restart the container to change these paths.
setup.folderPickerUnavailableInBrowser: Folder picker is unavailable for this connection. Use desktop mode or a same-machine host session, or enter the host path manually.
setup.metadataMirrorRootLockedByDocker: Managed by Docker mount. Update LGG_METADATA_MIRROR_ROOT in docker/.env (or shell env) and restart the container to change this path.
setup.metadataMirrorRootHint: Used as a synchronized metadata/pictures mirror and fallback browse source when the main games root is unavailable.
setup.metadataMirrorSyncConfirm: Mirror folder saved. Run initial metadata mirror sync now?
setup.metadataMirrorSyncTitle: Run initial metadata mirror sync now?
setup.metadataMirrorSyncBody: This sync reconciles mirror metadata and pictures against your current games root so fallback browsing is ready if the source root becomes unavailable.
setup.metadataMirrorParitySyncHint: Runs a full mirror parity reconciliation and may remove mirror pictures that no longer exist in the primary games root.
setup.metadataMirrorParitySyncConfirmBody: This manual sync enforces full parity between games root and metadata mirror, including removing mirror pictures that no longer exist in the source. Continue?
setup.appIconDropAria: Drop PNG icon here or click to select
setup.appIconDropHint: Drop a PNG file or click to choose one for future installer builds.
setup.appIconSizeHint: Use at least 256x256 PNG. Non-square icons are padded to square automatically.
setup.appIconDesktopOnlyHint: App icon picking and runtime apply are available only in the desktop app window.
setup.baseFontScaleHint: Affects only game content cards/lists/detail, not setup or top menus.
setup.metadataLineSpacingHint: Controls spacing between metadata lines in poster/card/expanded views and scales with font size.
setup.globalZoomHint: Also works with Ctrl + mouse wheel and +/- keys. Ctrl+0 resets to 100%.
setup.appIconWarningText: Custom PNG icons update preview immediately, can be applied for the current session, and are used on next app startup. Packaged executable and installer icons are build-time assets on Windows, so true installed identity changes still require rebuilding.

library.noGameFoldersBody: Point the app at your main Games folder, save the settings, and the gallery will list each child folder as a game.

filters.tagRulesHint: Click a bubble to edit. Right-click a bubble to remove. Prefix with - to exclude.
filters.topUsedHint: Top used tags right now. Click to add as a filter.

detail.decompressLaunchConfirmBody: {{version}} in {{game}} is currently compressed and must be decompressed before launch.
detail.decompressLaunchConfirmHint: The version will remain decompressed until you compress it again.
detail.noScreenshots: No screenshots yet. Placeholder visuals are being used.

metadata.tagsHint: Click a bubble to edit. Right-click a bubble to remove.

versionMismatch.title: Version notifications
versionMismatch.focusHint: Click a game to focus it in the gallery.

vaultModal.title: Unlock vault
vaultModal.description: Enter your vault PIN to reveal vaulted games.
vaultModal.addPinDescription: Set a PIN for future vault unlocks.
vaultModal.changePinDescription: Set a new PIN for future vault unlocks.

logs.clearConfirm: Clear all logs? This cannot be undone.

status.pickRootFirst: Pick a root folder to begin.
status.metadataMirrorRootRequiredForParitySync: Set a metadata mirror root before running parity sync.
status.metadataMirrorParitySyncCompleted: Complete parity sync finished for {{count}} game folders.
status.failedOpenMirrorFolderPicker: Failed to open metadata mirror folder picker.
status.failedPersistViewMode: Failed to persist selected view mode.
status.unableFindSelectedGame: Unable to find selected game in current list.
status.cannotRemoveTagInUse: Cannot remove "{{tag}}" because it is used by one or more games.
status.failedRenameTag: Failed to propagate tag rename to games.
status.appIconSelected: App icon selected. Save setup to persist it.
status.failedInspectAppIcon: Failed to inspect app icon file.
status.failedPickAppIcon: Failed to pick app icon file.
status.failedProcessDroppedIcon: Could not process dropped icon file.
status.couldNotReadDroppedPath: Could not read dropped file path. Use the picker button instead.
status.appIconReset: App icon reset to default. Save setup to persist it.
status.vaultPinMismatch: PIN and confirmation do not match.
status.scanCompletedNoMatches: Scan completed. No games matched yet.
status.launchDisabledMirrorFallback: Game launching is disabled while browsing from metadata mirror fallback.
